schema.title: Response Submit Task Submit Task Post

post.description: Schedule a task to run at a specific UTC datetime.

schema.title: Response Schedule Task Schedule Task Post

get.description:
Retrieve the status of a specific task.

If the task is the root of a DAG (has ``dag_callbacks``), the response
includes a ``dag_diagram`` field containing a mermaid flowchart of the
full DAG structure rooted at this task.

schema.title: Response Get Task Status Task Status  Task Id  Get

post.description: Cancel a running task by publishing to its cancellation channel.

schema.title: Response Cancel Task Task  Task Id  Cancel Post

post.description: Cancel multiple tasks by publishing to each task's cancellation channel.

schema.title: Response Cancel Tasks Tasks Cancel Post

get.description: Retrieve the list of all tasks.

schema.title: Response Get Task List Task List Get

get.description: Retrieve the list of all queues for a given role.

schema.title: Response Get Queues Queues  Role  Get

post.description: Set the list of all queues for a given role.

schema.title: Response Set Queues Queues  Role  Post

get.description: Retrieve the list of all queues.

schema.title: Response Get All Queues Queues Get

post.description: Create a new queue with its configuration. Returns 409 if the queue already exists.

get.description: Retrieve the configuration for a specific queue.

schema.title: Response Get Queue Config Queues  Queue Name  Config Get

put.description: Create or update the configuration for a queue. The name in the body is ignored; the path name is used.

schema.title: Response Update Queue Queues  Queue Name  Put

delete.description: Delete a queue and remove it from all roles. Returns 404 if the queue does not exist.

schema.title: Response Delete Queue Queues  Queue Name  Delete

get.description:
Search the dead letter queue.

Returns tasks that have exhausted retries or been permanently failed, optionally
filtered by queue, task name, or version. Results include the task summary and
the most recent error message.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of entries to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of entries to return.

schema.title: Response Get Dead Letter Queue Dead Letter Queue Get

delete.description: Bulk remove tasks from the dead letter queue by task ID.

schema.title: Response Remove From Dlq Dead Letter Queue Delete

get.description:
Retrieve the full failure history for a dead-lettered task.

Returns every recorded failure event for the task in chronological order,
including the retry attempt number, timestamp, and error message for each failure.

schema.title: Response Get Dlq Task History Dead Letter Queue  Task Id  History Get

post.description: Bulk resubmit tasks from the dead letter queue back into their active queues.

schema.title: Response Resubmit From Dlq Dead Letter Queue Resubmit Post

get.description: Retrieve tasks currently being executed (those with an active heartbeat record).

schema.title: Response Get Active Tasks Active Tasks Get

get.description: Retrieve scheduled tasks filtered by queue, and optionally by task name or version.

schema.title: Response Get Scheduled Tasks Scheduled Tasks Get

get.description: Retrieve the list of all roles.

schema.title: Response Get All Roles Roles Get

post.description: Create a new role with an initial set of queues. Returns 409 if the role already exists.

get.description: Retrieve the queues assigned to a specific role.

schema.title: Response Get Role Roles  Role Name  Get

put.description: Replace the queue list for a role. Returns 404 if the role does not exist.

schema.title: Response Update Role Roles  Role Name  Put

delete.description: Delete a role. Queue configs are preserved. Returns 404 if the role does not exist.

schema.title: Response Delete Role Roles  Role Name  Delete

post.description: Bump the refresh tag for a role, causing workers to reload their queue list on the next poll.

schema.title: Response Refresh Role Roles  Role Name  Refresh Post

get.description: Retrieve the routing configuration for a specific task type.

schema.title: Response Get Task Routing Task Routing  Task Name   Task Version  Get

put.description: Create or update the routing configuration for a task type. Path parameters override body values.

schema.title: Response Update Task Routing Task Routing  Task Name   Task Version  Put

delete.description: Remove the routing configuration for a task type. Returns 404 if it does not exist.

schema.title: Response Delete Task Routing Task Routing  Task Name   Task Version  Delete

post.description:
Submit an ad-hoc DAG defined as a mermaid flowchart.

Parses the diagram, assigns ULIDs to each node, initialises fan-in Redis
sets, and enqueues all root tasks.  Returns the IDs of the submitted root
tasks.

schema.title: Response Submit Dag Submit Dag Post

post.description: Create a new cron-scheduled DAG entry.

schema.title: Response Create Cron Dag Cron Dags Post

get.description: List all cron-scheduled DAG entries ordered by next run time.

schema.title: Response List Cron Dags Cron Dags Get

get.description: Retrieve a single cron-scheduled DAG entry by ID.

schema.title: Response Get Cron Dag Cron Dags  Cron Id  Get

put.description:
Replace the diagram and settings for a cron-scheduled DAG entry.

The entry ``id`` and ``created_at`` are preserved; the schedule is reset
to the next occurrence of the (possibly updated) cron expression.

schema.title: Response Update Cron Dag Cron Dags  Cron Id  Put

delete.description: Delete a cron-scheduled DAG entry. Returns 404 if not found.

schema.title: Response Delete Cron Dag Cron Dags  Cron Id  Delete

get.description: List all DAG runs ordered by submission time (oldest first).
Get details of a single DAG run including the IDs of all tasks within it.

schema.title: Response Get Dag Dags  Dag Run Id  Get

BackoffStrategy.title: BackoffStrategy
BackoffStrategy.description: Backoff strategy to use when retrying a task.

task_ids.title: Task Ids
task_ids.description: List of task IDs to cancel.

BulkCancelRequest.title: BulkCancelRequest
BulkCancelRequest.description: Request body for bulk task cancellation.

ConcurrencyPolicy.title: ConcurrencyPolicy
ConcurrencyPolicy.description: Controls what happens when a cron fires and the previous run is still active.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable name for the cron entry.

diagram.title: Diagram
diagram.description: Mermaid flowchart text describing the DAG.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the entry fires on schedule.

concurrency_policy.description: What to do when a new run fires while the previous one is still active.

CronDAGRequest.title: CronDAGRequest
CronDAGRequest.description: Request body for creating or updating a cron-scheduled DAG.

DAGTaskSpec.title: DAGTaskSpec
DAGTaskSpec.description:
Serialisable specification for a single task node.

The `id` is pre-assigned at DAG construction time so that fan-in sets can
reference it before the task is ever submitted.

task_ids.title: Task Ids
task_ids.description: List of task IDs to remove.

DLQRemoveRequest.title: DLQRemoveRequest
DLQRemoveRequest.description: Request body for bulk removal from the dead letter queue.

task_ids.title: Task Ids
task_ids.description: Explicit list of task IDs to resubmit.

queue.title: Queue
queue.description: Resubmit only tasks from this queue.

task_name.title: Task Name
task_name.description: Resubmit only tasks with this name.

task_version.title: Task Version
task_version.description: Resubmit only tasks with this version.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to resubmit (filter mode only).

DLQResubmitRequest.title: DLQResubmitRequest
DLQResubmitRequest.description:
Filter criteria for bulk resubmission from the dead letter queue.

Provide either `task_ids` for an explicit list, or one or more of `queue`,
`task_name`, and `task_version` to select by filter. At least one field
must be set to prevent accidentally resubmitting the entire queue.

DeadLetterPolicy.title: DeadLetterPolicy
DeadLetterPolicy.description: Dead letter policy to use when a task fails.

FanInCallback.title: FanInCallback
FanInCallback.description:
Submit `task` only once all fan-in predecessors have completed.

`fan_in_key` is a Redis key for a set of pending predecessor task IDs.
Each predecessor removes its own ID via `TaskAdapterProtocol.fan_in_complete`;
when the set becomes empty the collector task is submitted.

PaginationOrder.title: PaginationOrder
PaginationOrder.description: Supported fields to order task list by.

RoleRequest.title: RoleRequest
RoleRequest.description: Request body for creating a role.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.description: List of registered tasks with their versions.

RootResponse.title: RootResponse
RootResponse.description: Response model for the root endpoint.

RoutingConfig.title: RoutingConfig
RoutingConfig.description: Queue routing configuration for a task type.

RoutingStrategy.title: RoutingStrategy
RoutingStrategy.description: Queue routing strategy for a task type.

run_at.title: Run At
run_at.description: UTC datetime when the task should be executed.

ScheduleTaskRequest.title: ScheduleTaskRequest
ScheduleTaskRequest.description: Request body for scheduling a task at a specific time.

SimpleCallback.title: SimpleCallback
SimpleCallback.description: Submit `task` immediately when the parent task completes.

diagram.title: Diagram
diagram.description: Mermaid flowchart text describing the DAG.

SubmitDAGRequest.title: SubmitDAGRequest
SubmitDAGRequest.description: Request body for ad-hoc DAG submission from a mermaid diagram.

TaskShutdownPolicy.title: TaskShutdownPolicy
TaskShutdownPolicy.description: Possible ways to handle tasks when the worker is being shut down.
